KOVANMOD-STRIKE_KOVAN.title: Strike
KOVANMOD-DEFEND_KOVAN.title: Defend
KOVANMOD-PIN_DOWN.title: Pin Down
KOVANMOD-RIP_FREE.title: Rip Free
KOVANMOD-JUNK.description:
When played you get one of this effects.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card{IfUpgraded:show:s|}.
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} [gold]Nails[/gold].
KOVANMOD-JUNK.title: Junk
KOVANMOD-RETAIN_SELECT_PROMPT: Choose cards to Retain this turn.
KOVANMOD-IMPALE.title: Impale
KOVANMOD-RUSTY_PLATES.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If the target has [gold]Nails[/gold] apply {IfUpgraded:show: 2|1} [gold]Weak[/gold].
KOVANMOD-RUSTY_PLATES.title: Rusty Plates
KOVANMOD-IRON_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target has [gold]Nails[/gold] hits 2 times.
KOVANMOD-IRON_STRIKE.title: Iron Strike
KOVANMOD-SCATTERED_NAILS.description:
Draw 2 cards.
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:4|2} [gold]Nails[/gold] to ALL enemies.
KOVANMOD-SCATTERED_NAILS.title: Scattered Nails
KOVANMOD-RICOCHET.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage,
apply {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [gold]Nails[/gold]
to the target and to a random enemy.
KOVANMOD-RICOCHET.title: Ricochet
KOVANMOD-NAIL_SPRAY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {IfUpgraded:show:2 [gold]Nails[/gold]|1 [gold]Nail[/gold]} to ALL enemies.
KOVANMOD-NAIL_SPRAY.title: Nail Spray
KOVANMOD-TWIST_KNIFE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply 1 [gold]Nail[/gold].
If the target has [gold]Nails[/gold] apply {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} more.
KOVANMOD-TWIST_KNIFE.title: Twist Knife
KOVANMOD-SCAVENGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle {Cards:diff()} [gold]Junk[/gold] into the [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
KOVANMOD-SCAVENGE.title: Scavenge
KOVANMOD-SALVAGE.description:
Choose a card in your
[gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Barbed Strike+[/gold]|[gold]Barbed Strike[/gold]}.
KOVANMOD-SALVAGE.title: Salvage
KOVANMOD-BODY_ARMOR.title: Body Armor
KOVANMOD-SILVER_STAKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Give the same amount of [gold]Nails[/gold] to a random enemy.
KOVANMOD-SILVER_STAKE.title: Silver Stake
KOVANMOD-BRAMBLE_VEST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply {IfUpgraded:show:7|5} [gold]Nails[/gold] to the attacker.
KOVANMOD-BRAMBLE_VEST.title: Bramble Vest
KOVANMOD-TOOLBOX.description:
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:8|5} [gold]Nails[/gold].
Next turn draw 2 cards.
The enemy gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
KOVANMOD-TOOLBOX.title: Toolbox
KOVANMOD-FIVE_POINT_STRIKE.title: Five Point Strike
KOVANMOD-DETERMINATION.description: Whenever you give [gold]Strength[/gold] to an enemy, you gain {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [gold]Strength[/gold].
KOVANMOD-DETERMINATION.title: Determination
KOVANMOD-CHAIN_REACTION.description: If any enemy has at least 6 [gold]Nails[/gold], consume them and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
KOVANMOD-CHAIN_REACTION.title: Chain Reaction
KOVANMOD-TIT_FOR_TAT.description: Steal all the [gold]Strength[/gold] from the enemy and gain that amount in [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
KOVANMOD-TIT_FOR_TAT.title: Tit for Tat
KOVANMOD-BAG_OF_NAILS.description:
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:10|7} [gold]Nails[/gold].
Whenever you apply [gold]Nails[/gold], reduce this cost by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
KOVANMOD-BAG_OF_NAILS.title: Bag of Nails
KOVANMOD-THROWING_NAILS.description:
[gold]Expertise[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} [gold]Nails[/gold] to a random enemy.
Put this card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
KOVANMOD-THROWING_NAILS.title: Throwing Nails
KOVANMOD-NAIL_BARRAGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} [gold]Nails[/gold] thrice to a random enemy.
KOVANMOD-NAIL_BARRAGE.title: Nail Barrage
KOVANMOD-RECYCLE.description: The first [gold]Junk[/gold] you play each turn is played an extra time.
KOVANMOD-RECYCLE.title: Recycle
KOVANMOD-NAIL_GUN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} [gold]Nails[/gold].
Shuffle 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold] into the [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
KOVANMOD-NAIL_GUN.title: Nail Gun
KOVANMOD-ANCIENT_RECALL.description:
Trigger [gold]Nails[/gold] from ALL enemies.
Give the same amount to an enemy.
KOVANMOD-ANCIENT_RECALL.title: Ancient Recall
KOVANMOD-SAKAAR.description:
Fill your [gold]Hand[/gold] with {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Junk+[/gold]|[gold]Junk[/gold]}.
ALL enemies gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
KOVANMOD-SAKAAR.title: Sakaar
KOVANMOD-HAMMERFALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Trigger [gold]Nails[/gold] without consuming them.
Apply {IfUpgraded:show:10|6} [gold]Nails[/gold].
KOVANMOD-HAMMERFALL.title: Hammerfall
